Meet the barber

Craft in every chair.

“A fade should look as good on day ten as it does walking out the door.”

Brazen Headz is led by Chris Meade — a barber obsessed with the details, from a razor-sharp fade to a beard lined up just right.

Every client gets the full experience: a proper consultation, a clean finish, and a studio that feels a cut above.
